title: Core Calculator Index Truth Check — Day 4

contradiction_explained.what_happened: Day 2 report incorrectly reported 8/10 as 'Submitted and indexed' meaning they WERE indexed. In reality, 'Submitted and indexed' is the GSC coverage report CATEGORY, not the actual indexing status.
contradiction_explained.root_cause: Misread of GSC URL Inspection API fields. coverageState='Submitted and indexed' is a report bucket label, not an indexing confirmation. indexingState='INDEXING_ALLOWED' is the actual status.

correct_fields.coverageState: GSC report category — where the page appears in the Indexing report. 'Submitted and indexed' = page is in that section.
correct_fields.indexingState: Actual indexing status. 'INDEXING_ALLOWED' = crawled + allowed but NOT indexed. 'INDEXING_STATE_INDEXED' = fully indexed and serving in results.
correct_fields.verdict: PASS = no issues found, indexing is allowed

contradiction_explained.bottom_line: ALL 10 core calculators are INDEXING_ALLOWED, not INDEXING_STATE_INDEXED. They have been crawled, are technically sound, but Google has not yet added them to the search index.

mortgage-calculator.coverage_state: Submitted and indexed (report category, NOT actual status)
mortgage-calculator.status_summary: Google has crawled this page, found no issues, allows indexing, but has NOT yet added it to the search index.
